curation_notes: Patch commit a5e723a identified from advisory references. Only 1 source file changed (TableLookupWizard.php). Location derived from patch diff: the fix adds intval casting in the prepareWhere() function for both checkbox (array_map intval) and radio ((int) cast) field types before SQL interpolation. No sibling files exist as the repo contains only a single PHP source file. Vulnerability class sql-injection confirmed from CWE-89 and the patch clearly adding integer sanitization to prevent SQL injection.
